title: Envelope
description: Letters. Packages. And Pigeons to deliver them across the world.
body:
### Pigeon Mail #### Letters, Packages, Deliveries and more...












Description in text form

Pigeon

Friendly creature, that can be found in mountain areas or near a village - Likes seeds of various kind, and will happily follow someone if they have some - Hunted by Wild Cats, Ocelots and Foxes

Pigeonhole

A cozy house for pigeons to rest inside of, and leave their, ehm... “byproducts”

Letter

Good alternative to a book, if you don’t have much to say
Just keep it away from foxes...

Package

Slightly inconvenient (but pretty cheap) way to reduce inventory clutter
Convenient for deliveries, though

Sealing

A way to ensure an author and integrity of a Letter or Package

Mailbox

Entrypoint into the fascinating world of mail delivery - Every Mailbox in the overworld must have an address - Connecting a Mailbox to the mail network costs 3 experience levels - Stores received mail - Allows sending mail

Address Tag

- Use the item to open Address Selection GUI - All available addresses are shown - Use on a mailable item in GUI to set the recipient - Can be used on a Mailbox to change its address

Delivery

When mail and seeds are inserted into a Mailbox, its front hatch will open, allowing nearby Pigeons to pick mail up and start a delivery - Pigeons can deliver mail (and return to) unloaded chunks without issues - Delivering Pigeons ascend high above the clouds to make traveling long distances more efficient, thus they can only be seen while nearby a Mailbox

Payback Tag

- Used on a mailable item to set the requested payback - Anything that fits in the Package can be requested Allows for a safe trade of items: - Transaction will be handled by Mail Service - Buyer receives Payback Box for the payment - Mail will be kept in storage untill the buyer pays for it - If buyer does not pay in time - mail will be returned back to sender

Services

Virtual addresses that can receive mail and perform various actions - Includes mail crafting system and recipes - Extendable by datapacks, addons or KubeJS scripts



### The mod is not finished yet #### Currently planned features include: **Worldgen** - structures, loot in chests, etc
**General polishing** - advancements, stats, improvements, etc
**Exposure integration** --- ### Feedback needed! Cool ideas and suggestions are always welcome! Especially if they are clearly presented and well argued.
Or maybe something is not right? Let me know through discord or dms. ---
[](https://discord.gg/FzHKGDW2et)

#### Enjoying the mod? Your support would allow me to continue working on it and on other mods! [](https://patreon.com/mortuusars?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink) [](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=4VPMCBCLZVUEA)
